basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially announced the Project Associate Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on the official IIT Roorkee website. Candidates who possess a B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with work experience in a research laboratory or government institution can submit their applications through email on or before 20 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with work experience in a Research laboratory/ government institution
qualification.details: B. Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with work experience in a Research laboratory/ government institution.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25000 - 60000 Per Month INR 25000/- to INR 60000/- + HRA

selection_process: Application Submission via Email Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate position at IIT Roorkee is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Tech degree in Computer Science and Engineering. Additionally, relevant work experience in a research laboratory or a government institution is required.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the Project Associate vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate position ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month, potentially including HRA, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate position at the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application submission via email, followed by an interview, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position at IIT Roorkee is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, at the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee campus.
